debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
hmax : IsMin D
x y : PersistenceSubmodule M
hxy : Disjoint x y
hN : x ⊔ y ∈ D
hx : ¬x = ⊥
hy : ¬y = ⊥
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := ⋯
⊢ ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), sSupIndep (B N hN)

proof:
(by
      intro N hN
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs
      · rw [sSupIndep_pair]
        · exact hxy
        · rintro rfl; exact hx (disjoint_self.mp hxy)
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton _)
failed_attempts:
(fun N _ ↦ by
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs
      · rw [sSupIndep_pair (Disjoint.ne hxy hx hy)]
        exact hxy
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton N)

(by
      intro N hN
      dsimp [B]
      split_ifs
      · rw [sSupIndep_pair]
        · exact hxy
        · rintro rfl; exact hx (disjoint_self.mp hxy)
      · intro a ha
        simp at ha; subst ha
        simp
        exact disjoint_bot_right)

(by
      intro N hN
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs
      · rw [sSupIndep_pair]
        · exact hxy
        · intro h
          rw [h] at hxy
          exact hx hxy.eq_bot
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton N)

(by
      intro N hN
      dsimp [B]
      split_ifs
      · rw [sSupIndep_pair]
        · exact hxy
        · rintro rfl; exact hx (disjoint_self.1 hxy)
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton N)
    sorry

(by
      rintro K -
      dsimp [B]
      split_ifs
      · refine (sSupIndep_pair ?_).mpr hxy
        rintro rfl
        exact hx hxy.eq_bot_of_self
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton K)
    sorry

(fun N hN ↦ by
      dsimp [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · rw [sSupIndep_pair (fun e ↦ hx <| disjoint_self.mp <| e ▸ hxy)]
        exact hxy
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton N)

(by
      intro K _
      dsimp [B]
      split_ifs
      · rw [sSupIndep_pair]
        · exact hxy
        · intro h; rw [h] at hxy; exact hx (disjoint_self.mp hxy)
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton K)

(by
      intro N hN
      dsimp [B]
      split_ifs
      · have hne : x ≠ y := by rintro rfl; rw [disjoint_self] at hxy; exact hx hxy
        rw [sSupIndep_pair hne]
        exact hxy
      · intro a ha
        simp at ha; subst ha
        simp
        exact disjoint_bot_right)

(by
      intro N hN
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs
      · rw [sSupIndep_pair]
        · exact hxy
        · exact ne_of_disjoint_of_ne_bot hxy hx hy
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton N)

(by
      intro N hN
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs
      · rw [sSupIndep_pair]
        · exact hxy
        · rintro rfl; exact hx (disjoint_self.mp hxy)
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton N)
    sorry
successful_attempts:
(by
      intro N hN
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs
      · rw [sSupIndep_pair]
        · exact hxy
        · rintro rfl; exact hx (disjoint_self.mp hxy)
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton _)

(fun N hN ↦ by
      dsimp [B]
      split_ifs
      · refine (sSupIndep_pair ?_).mpr hxy
        rintro rfl
        exact hx hxy.eq_bot_of_self
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton N)

(by
      intro N hN
      dsimp [B]
      split_ifs
      · have hne : x ≠ y := by rintro rfl; exact hx (disjoint_self.mp hxy)
        exact (sSupIndep_pair hne).mpr hxy
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton N)

(by
      intro N hN
      dsimp [B]
      split_ifs
      · rw [sSupIndep_pair]
        · exact hxy
        · by_contra h; subst h; exact hx (disjoint_self.mp hxy)
      · intro a ha
        simp at ha
        subst ha
        simp)

(by
      intro N' hN'
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs
      · rw [sSupIndep_pair]
        · exact hxy
        · rintro rfl
          exact hx (disjoint_self.1 hxy)
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton N')

(by
      intro N _
      dsimp [B]
      split_ifs
      · refine (sSupIndep_pair ?_).mpr hxy
        rintro rfl
        exact hx hxy.eq_bot_of_self
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton _)

(by
      intro N _
      dsimp [B]
      split_ifs
      · rw [sSupIndep_pair]
        · exact hxy
        · rintro rfl
          exact hx (disjoint_self.mp hxy)
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton N)

(by
      intro N hN
      dsimp [B]
      split_ifs
      · rw [sSupIndep_pair]
        · exact hxy
        · rintro rfl; exact hx (disjoint_self.mp hxy)
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton N)

(by
      intro N hN
      dsimp [B]
      split_ifs
      · rw [sSupIndep_pair]
        · exact hxy
        · rintro rfl; exact hx (disjoint_self.mp hxy)
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton N)

(by
      intro N _
      dsimp [B]
      split_ifs
      · have : x ≠ y := by rintro rfl; exact hx hxy.eq_bot_of_self
        rw [sSupIndep_pair this]
        exact hxy
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton _)

(fun N _ ↦ by
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs
      · rw [sSupIndep_pair]
        · exact hxy
        · rintro rfl; exact hx hxy.eq_bot_of_self
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton _)

(by
      intro N _
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs
      · rw [sSupIndep_pair]
        · exact hxy
        · rintro rfl; exact hx hxy.eq_bot_of_self
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton _)

(by
      intro N hN
      dsimp [B]
      split_ifs
      · rw [sSupIndep_pair]
        · exact hxy
        · rintro rfl; exact hx (disjoint_self.mp hxy)
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton N)

(by
      intro N' _
      dsimp [B]
      split_ifs
      · have hne : x ≠ y := by rintro rfl; exact hx hxy.eq_bot_of_self
        rwa [sSupIndep_pair hne]
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton _)

(by
      intro N hN
      dsimp only [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · have hne : x ≠ y := fun h' ↦ hx <| disjoint_self.1 <| h' ▸ hxy
        rwa [sSupIndep_pair hne]
      · intro a ha
        simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at ha
        subst ha
        simp)

(by
      intro N _
      dsimp [B]
      split_ifs
      · refine (sSupIndep_pair ?_).mpr hxy
        rintro rfl
        exact hx (disjoint_self.mp hxy)
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton N)

(by
      intro N hN
      dsimp [B]
      split_ifs
      · have h_ne : x ≠ y := by rintro rfl; exact hx (hxy.eq_bot_of_le le_rfl)
        rw [sSupIndep_pair h_ne]
        exact hxy
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton N)
